ogTitle: Haigslea vs Haliday Bay: Climate Safety

heading: Haigslea vs Haliday Bay — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Haigslea, Queensland and Haliday Bay, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Haliday Bay has a lower overall climate risk score (24/100) compared to Haigslea (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Haigslea or Haliday Bay safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Haigslea has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Haliday Bay scores 25/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Haigslea scores 63/100 for bushfire risk. Haliday Bay scores 17/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Haigslea or Haliday Bay?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Haliday Bay has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.83% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
